textByHash.0015143d6591c7ea2823cf1f7f43140fb0c66622: Well, ya wouldn't be the first, sailor! I reckon ya probably won't be the the last either. Don't worry though, we can help ya out... for a price of course!
textByHash.0568f7a7480cc7cdb9d71c46390a0a9a7fcfc767: For planks, you'll need to take matching logs to a sawmill. I know there's a few around, but I like to get mine from the one north east of Varrock.
textByHash.0884a89952733e7c0993680654978e1392da523d: Well, while they're happy to give ya a helping hand, they are going to expect ya to take the lead.
textByHash.11a644b134f6381a6c532fd6a3c6dd0bf328d38d: Well, ain't that the question on everyone's mind, sailor? But to answer, it depends on what materials you'll be wanting.
textByHash.1882f53c952394830033541e3c0a2daf35f7c70f: Alrighty! Let's call some of the workers over...
textByHash.216778835ce574c7158b80dd9d483886db41d54b: Afraid so, sailor. Oh, and don't forget that even when we're helping ya out, we're still gonna need ya to supply the materials.
textByHash.2be9e22f89c668ae5a477c30f0bb656c2724ae38: Well, we might be able to help ya out there... for a price of course!
textByHash.3579de461c761e6d847b4bc4830ebfad2402a9ff: Ha! You're a funny one, sailor! Anyhoo, this here is the place where ya can modify your boat to your heart's content! Ya can do that in two ways.
textByHash.3c82a2135e277722633c85e8941e49fe51f2355e: Well, that there depends on how hard the job is. The more skills needed, the more money you're gonna need to part with.
textByHash.4951805ef4c7519d1beb2f84f04449eeb8699710: If ya need standard hull parts, you'll wanna take five planks to a workbench. We've got one right here, but any good shipwright's gonna have one.
textByHash.5fa09526bc303209ae3047180eadf503b1018ebc: Well now, I reckon we might be able to help ya out there... for a price of course!
textByHash.60f65f8b8ca0872e167bd4a0a78c45b15a587a58: Sure thing, sailor. That'll cost ya coins.
textByHash.659b21207bf5066fa8dd2ee1bdf6ce855d697531: Once you're on board, you'll find that you've got different spots on your boat for different facilities! If ya can't find what you're looking for, be sure to check the other spots as well!
textByHash.7a54e6f578566c6d37bf433fd0d233a9b018de3a: Much like with building facilities, ya can use the board to pick the part of your boat ya wanna upgrade!
textByHash.8449ea3fc042729abb0a64a3ad0fc33e4bdf996d: I've got a few basic shipbuilding supplies that ya might find handy. Take a look, sailor!
textByHash.885a520a6000993fc30571936b2b80d2e7916e8d: For the larger hull parts or keel parts, don't overthink it. Just grab five of the standard parts and put them together in the same way!
textByHash.97bbaef14ddff6edb398040e14be6e3f2e2f2299: Now, the other way ya can modify your boat is by upgrading the core components of it. If ya fancy doing that, you'll wanna use this here schematics board!
textByHash.9c88711bd8a1e10574905cd900006f19eb6a8010: Looks like ya boat's already all fine and dandy, sailor.
textByHash.9d30865838e3174cce8b68f1667dea114491b4e6: We're also only gonna be able to help ya with the more standard parts and facilities, so hulls, sails, helms, keels, cannons, salvaging hooks and cargo holds.
textByHash.9ef53c0697f2c0b8f5802171f8cef2475ee31c5c: Now, it's important ya keep in mind that these upgrades are the big ones! They're too much to handle solo, so we'll wrangle up some of the workers to lend ya a hand. They'll also supply the tools for ya!
textByHash.a9f41fe6e3113100d941a3967cedd9f63a144825: Why, this is the shipyard, of course! I'd say it's the finest one in all of Gielinor!
textByHash.b7507507e3be15847a512275a49aa05f44061ad3: That's all done for ya, sailor.
textByHash.db5e71e350dba5d7eb4078a15492edfc465ad90d: Why howdy there, sailor! Welcome to this here fine shipyard. Anything I can help ya with?
textByHash.e220b983e51545704f34e50960dbcc5bf63392b8: Finally, if it helps ya at all, I've got some basic supplies for sale.
textByHash.e22c0e414438b813b03f38fb815e28cd5ebff515: Anyhoo, I think that just about covers the shipyard. Anything else I can do for ya?
textByHash.e375946005771fdc7df60ec645eb565182b8c755: If it's standard keel parts ya need, you'll wanna take five metal bars to any old anvil.
textByHash.e3e67fac47b45b39c6822f2b30da04f26c159ef2: Yeah I'd say that's a good way of putting it. In general, we'll only be able to help ya with things that use less fancy materials. Mithril and mahogany are gonna be the limit.
textByHash.eb4f3ec7732d3977f71a67f7942777ae6173f741: Ya look like a smart enough sailor to know where to find logs and bars. Nails, ya make from taking a metal bar to an anvil.
textByHash.ef7b678a48e87cf2078bcc6b37385aa965a5e614: Obviously, some raw materials are rarer than others, and some of them ya might need to go sail that great blue marble to get.
